title: Manual invoice void omits audit event
description: A required product audit trail is not recorded.
requirement: REQ-AUDIT-1: Every manual invoice void must record an immutable audit event with the actor and invoice id.
seededViolation: The endpoint voids the invoice but does not write the audit event.
whyItMatters: Support and finance cannot determine who voided an invoice.

expectedFindings.title: Manual invoice void has no audit event
expectedFindings.description: The mutation completes without recording the required actor and invoice audit trail.

distractors.description: The response returns the voided invoice.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Returning the updated resource is normal API behavior.
